items.title: Ollama releases: v0.30.8
items.description:
## What's Changed
* Fixed `ollama launch` selecting the wrong provider in some cases
* Improved prompt caching by decoupling it from context shift for better KV cache reuse
* More stable MLX inference with hardened linear and embedding layers
* MLX runner now creates snapshots during prompt proc

# vLLM v0.23.0 Release Notes

Please note that Minimax M3 is not yet supported in this version. Please follow [vLLM recipe](https://recipes.vllm.ai/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3) for usage guides for M3.
